extraction.one_line_summary: LAGESSE won sprint on Stage 1 after BOUHANNI started too early and inadvertently led him out, while MOVISTAR won Stage 2 TTT before later time penalties.
tactical_patterns: BOUHANNI initiated sprint prematurely from second position, allowing trailing rider to use slipstream momentum for line victory.
GREIPEL positioned fifth wheel in Stage 1 sprint, abandoned effort early recognizing positioning error.
MOVISTAR surprisingly competitive in TTT despite lacking time trial reputation, suggesting peaked preparation for Catalunya.

rider_signals.BOUHANNI Nacer: negative: poor sprint timing and positioning, started effort too early and led out competitor for defeat
rider_signals.GREIPEL André: neutral: recognized poor positioning fifth wheel in sprint, conserved energy by sitting up early
rider_signals.VALVERDE Alejandro: positive: team unexpectedly fast in TTT, set fastest time before later penalties on Stage 3
rider_signals.CONTADOR Alberto: negative: Trek team lost 1:15 to MOVISTAR in TTT, significant deficit for GC contender this early
